test_cases.description: Verify booking confirmation modal correctly reflects success when API returns HTTP 200.
test_cases.expected_result: Modal should display a success state when the API returns HTTP 200.
test_cases.actual_result: Modal showed a failure state despite HTTP 200 response; reproduced twice, then became non-reproducing.
test_cases.comments: Reproduced twice consistently, then became non-reproducing. Backend confirmed booking succeeded despite frontend showing failure.

test_cases.description: Verify booking appears correctly in the bookings list even when the frontend shows a failure modal.
test_cases.expected_result: Booking should appear in the bookings list regardless of the frontend modal state, if backend succeeded.
test_cases.actual_result: Booking confirmed present in bookings list despite frontend showing a failure modal.
test_cases.comments: Confirmed via bookings list; backend state was correct despite the frontend error.

test_cases.description: Verify modal behavior under slow network/high latency conditions (suspected trigger for frontend/backend state mismatch).
test_cases.expected_result: Modal should correctly reflect final booking state even under slow network/high latency conditions.
test_cases.actual_result: Not yet tested; suspected trigger condition, pending formal ticket.
test_cases.comments: Formal bug ticket to be written
